---
name: Lab-run feedback (beta)
about: You ran (or tried to run) the lab. Tell us what happened.
title: '[FEEDBACK] '
labels: feedback, beta
assignees: ''
---

<!-- Thanks for running the beta. Short answers are totally fine. Fill in what applies, skip what doesn't. -->

## Where are you in the run?

- [ ] Didn't get past the prereqs
- [ ] Bootstrap failed / hung
- [ ] Finished Phase 1 (deployed, logged in, ran first query)
- [ ] Finished Phase 2 (baseline attack + manual investigation)
- [ ] Finished Phase 3 (MCP threat-model + AI-augmented investigation)
- [ ] Finished Phase 4 (backdoor hunt)
- [ ] Finished Phase 5 (wrote rule 100001 + active response)
- [ ] Finished Phase 6 (closed the case + destroyed the lab)
- [ ] Ran the whole thing end-to-end

## What went well?

<!-- Any moment that landed, anything you'd tell a friend about, anything that made you feel like you actually got it -->

## What went sideways?

<!-- Where did you get stuck, confused, bored, or where did Mateo feel off? The more specific the better — section/step number if you've got it -->

## What broke?

<!-- Bootstrap errors, dashboard didn't load, MCP wouldn't connect, etc. Paste error messages if you have them -->

## Setup (if the issue was technical)

- Your OS: <!-- macOS / Linux / WSL2 -->
- AWS region: <!-- us-east-1, etc. -->
- Did you hit the prereq one-liner cleanly? yes / no
- Claude Code version: <!-- claude --version -->

## Anything else

<!-- Honest opinions welcome. What would make this better? -->
